title: Verify user cannot access another user's trial information
description: Security test ensuring users can only see their own trial status
preconditions: Two user accounts exist with different trial statuses

steps.description: 1. User A with active trial logs in
2. Attempt to access User B's trial information via URL manipulation
3. Check if User A can view User B's trial details

expected_result: User A can only see their own trial information, unauthorized access is denied
